calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-032b dACC-analog adaptive control validation -- 3-arm ablation (OFF / ON-independent / ON-shared-trunk)
items.notes: Substrate validation for SD-032b dACC-analog (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19). Three-arm phased-training ablation: OFF (dACC disabled) / ON_INDEPENDENT (ARC-033 per-stream E2_harm_a) / ON_SHARED (ARC-058 shared HarmForwardTrunk). Phased P0 (50 eps encoder warmup) + P1 (100 eps frozen-encoder E2_harm_a training with .detach()ed targets) + P2 (30 eps eval). C1 MECH-258 both ON arms harm_a_forward_r2 >= 0.3 in >=2/3 seeds. C2 SD-032b dACC routing produces |entropy_on - entropy_off| >= 0.1 nats in either ON arm. C3 MECH-260 ON entropy >= OFF entropy in >=2/3 seeds (no diversity collapse). C4 DIAGNOSTIC: ARC-033 vs ARC-058 forward_r2 comparison informs governance arbitration but never fails run. experiment_purpose=diagnostic: substrate readiness gate, not yet governance evidence.

items.title: SD-032a salience-network coordinator validation -- 2-arm ablation + synthetic injection + V4 extensibility
items.notes: Substrate validation for SD-032a salience-network coordinator (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19). 2-arm ablation (COORD_OFF / COORD_ON with salience_apply_to_dacc_bias=True) x 2 seeds (42, 7), 6 episodes x 80 steps each. Plus deterministic API-level unit checks. C1 ON-arm operating_mode entropy > 0.05 nats (coordinator emits non-degenerate distribution). C2 MECH-259 synthetic pe=10.0 injection fires mode_switch_trigger and shifts argmax to internal_planning. C3 MECH-261 all 8 default write-gates (sd_033a..d, hc_viability, sensory_buffer, autonomic, e3_policy) in [0, 1]. C4 V4 extensibility: register_target() accepts new mode key (parallel_goal_deliberation) without schema changes. C5 backward compat: |entropy_on - entropy_off| <= 0.2 nats with default coordinator weights. experiment_purpose=diagnostic: substrate readiness, not yet governance evidence. SD-032a stays v3_pending until SD-032c/d/e land.

items.title: SD-032d PCC-analog metastability scalar -- substrate validation (deterministic arithmetic + agent integration)
items.notes: Substrate validation for SD-032d PCC-analog (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19). SD-032d is non-trainable arithmetic, so primary validation is deterministic API + arithmetic checks. C1 baseline_neutral: stability within 0.01 of baseline=0.5 with all-neutral inputs. C2 fatigue_monotone: stability strictly decreasing across drive_level 0.0/0.5/1.0 (falsification-signature direct test). C3 offline_recency_monotone: stability decreasing as steps_since_offline grows 0/250/500/1000 (saturates at window). C4 offline_reset_hook: note_offline_entry resets counter + restores stability. C5 success_ema_convergence: ema > 0.95 after 200 outcomes at alpha=0.02. C6 threshold_modulation: SalienceCoordinator effective_threshold strictly increasing in pcc_stability across 0.1/0.5/0.9 (MECH-259 wiring confirmed). C7 agent_integration: REEAgent select_action populates _pcc_last_tick AND injects pcc_stability into coordinator before tick. C8 backward_compat: use_pcc_analog=False -> agent.pcc is None and convenience hooks no-op. PASS = all 8 checks. Behavioural falsification of rest-driven mode-switch-rate signature requires combined SD-032a+SD-032c+SD-032d 4-arm 2x2 follow-up once cluster fully landed. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: SD-032c AIC-analog operating-mode + drive-dependent descending modulation -- 4-arm retest of EXQ-325a
items.notes: Substrate validation for SD-032c AIC-analog (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19). Supersedes EXQ-325a (non_contributory; DESCENDING==CONTROL bit-identical under raw beta_gate check). Four-arm design: AIC_ON (use_aic_analog=True, aic_drive_protect_weight=1.0) / AIC_DRIVE_ABLATED (aic_drive_protect_weight=0.0; the falsification-signature ablation) / LEGACY (use_aic_analog=False, raw-beta-gate path) / CONTROL (no attenuation). 5 seeds x 300 train eps + 30 eval eps x 200 steps. C1 AIC_ON harm_s_ratio < CONTROL harm_s_ratio (attenuation present). C2 AIC_ON harm_a_ratio selective (|delta| < 0.3 vs CONTROL). C3 AIC_ON n_committed >= 10 (commit substrate fires). C4 |AIC_ON harm_s_ratio - AIC_DRIVE_ABLATED harm_s_ratio| > 0.02 (drive-dependence structural -- the EXQ-325a fix). C5 AIC_ON aic_salience_mean > 0 (module non-trivial). PASS threshold: >=3/5 seeds satisfy all C1-C5. experiment_purpose=evidence. On PASS: supports SD-032c and (as re-routed) SD-021 -- clears v3_pending on SD-032c.
